module.name: require-exported-object-type
module.description: Require exported object constants to declare an explicit type annotation.

scenarios.name: should allow a directly exported frozen object const with an explicit type annotation
scenarios.given: an export written as export const StatusMap: Readonly<Record<string, string>> = Object.freeze({ Active: 'active' })
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level declarations

scenarios.name: should allow an indirectly exported object const with an explicit type annotation
scenarios.given: a module written as const StatusMap: Record<string, string> = { Active: 'active' }; export { StatusMap }
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level declarations

scenarios.name: should report a directly exported object literal const without a type annotation
scenarios.given: an export written as export const StatusMap = { Active: 'active' }
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level declarations

scenarios.name: should report a directly exported frozen object const without a type annotation
scenarios.given: an export written as export const StatusMap = Object.freeze({ Active: 'active' })
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level declarations

scenarios.name: should report an indirectly exported frozen object const without a type annotation
scenarios.given: a module written as const StatusMap = Object.freeze({ Active: 'active' }); export { StatusMap as StatusValues }
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the top-level declarations
